title: Notes on the New Testament
author: Albert Barnes
tradition_notes: Barnes was an American New School Presbyterian minister and biblical expositor. His notes were written for a popular audience, combining exegetical, doctrinal, and practical commentary. Moderately Calvinist, broadly evangelical.
notes: Barnes died 1870 -- text is public domain in all jurisdictions. NT-only coverage. Originally published 1832-1851 in 11 volumes. SWORD module version 1.1 includes formatting corrections over v1.0.
